# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main"]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: production
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: read
  id-token: write

env:
  CI: true

jobs:
  build_test:
    name: Build & Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Detect project
        id: detect
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then echo "pm=npm" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"; exit 0; fi
          if [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then echo "pm=pnpm" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"; exit 0; fi
          if [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then echo "pm=yarn" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"; exit 0; fi
          echo "pm=npm" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.pm }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        if: steps.detect.outputs.pm == 'pnpm'
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: "9"
          run_install: false

      - name: Install dependencies (npm)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.pm == 'npm'
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --fund=false

      - name: Install dependencies (yarn)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.pm == 'yarn'
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline

      - name: Install dependencies (pnpm)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.pm == 'pnpm'
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline

      - name: Test
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if npm run -s test --if-present 2>/dev/null; then
            npm run test --if-present
          else
            echo "No test script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if npm run -s build --if-present 2>/dev/null; then
            npm run build --if-present
          else
            echo "No build script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Package artifact
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          ART="build-${GITHUB_SHA}.tgz"
          echo "artifact_name=$ART" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          tar -czf "$ART" \
            --exclude-vcs \
            --exclude="./node_modules" \
            --exclude="./.git" \
            .

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 3
          compression-level: 0

  deploy_production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs: build_test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build_test.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: .

      - name: Extract artifact
        shell: bash
        run: |
          tar -xzf "${{ needs.build_test.outputs.artifact_name }}"

      - name: Deploy (customize)
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PORT: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PORT || 22 }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
          SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_COMMAND }}
        run: |
          if [[ -z "${DEPLOY_HOST:-}" || -z "${DEPLOY_USER:-}" || -z "${DEPLOY_PATH:-}" || -z "${SSH_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" ]]; then
            echo "Missing deploy secrets. Provide DEPLOY_HOST, DEPLOY_USER, DEPLOY_PATH, SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Optionally DEPLOY_COMMAND."
            exit 1
          fi

          install -m 700 -d ~/.ssh
          printf "%s" "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan -p "$DEPLOY_PORT" -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

          RELEASE_ID="${GITHUB_SHA}"
          RELEASE_DIR="${DEPLOY_PATH%/}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"
          CURRENT_LINK="${DEPLOY_PATH%/}/current"

          ssh -p "$DEPLOY_PORT" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" "set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p '${DEPLOY_PATH%/}/releases' '${DEPLOY_PATH%/}/shared'"

          rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -p $DEPLOY_PORT" \
            --exclude ".git" \
            --exclude "node_modules" \
            ./ "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${RELEASE_DIR}/"

          ssh -p "$DEPLOY_PORT" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" "set -euo pipefail; ln -sfn '${RELEASE_DIR}' '${CURRENT_LINK}'"

          if [[ -n "${DEPLOY_COMMAND:-}" ]]; then
            ssh -p "$DEPLOY_PORT" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" "set -euo pipefail; cd '${CURRENT_LINK}' && ${DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
          fi

      - name: Post-deploy cleanup (keep last 5)
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PORT: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PORT || 22 }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
        run: |
          ssh -p "$DEPLOY_PORT" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" "set -euo pipefail;
            cd '${DEPLOY_PATH%/}/releases' 2>/dev/null || exit 0;
            ls -1dt */ 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf"
